sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE status = #{level1} AND department = #{level2} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%') AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level4}, '%') AND created_at > #{level5}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at, updated_at FROM users
<where>
    <if test="level1 != null">
        <if test="level2 != null">
            <if test="level3 != null">
                <if test="level4 != null">
                    <if test="level5 != null">
                        AND status = #{level1}
                        AND department = #{level2}
                        AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level3}, '%')
                        AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{level4}, '%')
                        AND created_at > #{level5}
                    </if>
                </if>
            </if>
        </if>
    </if>
</where>
